rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Order Determining Prevailing Party On Appeal And Fixing Attorney'S Fees Recoverable As Costs
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 24, 2023 line 1. RESPONDENT MARK EPSTEIN, SAMETC, LLC, SEILER EPSTEIN ZIEGLER & APPLEGATE, LLP Motion For Order Determining Prevailing Party On Appeal And Fixing Attorney'S Fees Recoverable As Costs is continued to January 12, 2024 pending appeal. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: DIANE M. AARON ET AL VS. PAUL F. CADEMARTORI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Paul Cademartori To Provide A Further Response To Plaintiff Charles Schaibles Special Interrogatory No. 14 And For Sanctions Against Mr. Cademartori
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 24, 2023 line 3. PLAINTIFF DIANE AARON, CHARLES SCHAIBLE Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Paul Cademartori To Provide A Further Response To Plaintiff Charles Schaibles Special Interrogatory No. 14 And For Sanctions Against Mr. Cademartori is GRANTED. Complete verified supplemental response must be provided within 7 days of notice of entry of this order. Request for fees is denied. Declaration in support of the fee request is too vague. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Order To Stay Enforcement Of Summary Judgment And Any Writ Of Possession Pending Appeal ***Filed Pursuant To Litigants Request***

DEFENDANT SHANDA LOVE, SHANNON WILLIAMS, MASHAMA NOLAN Mtn For Order To Stay Enforcement Of Summary Judgment And Any Writ Of Possession Pending Appeal ***Filed Pursuant To Litigants Request*** is continued to October 31, 2023.
